collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (4 total Queries, 3 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT j.job_id as id, j.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM applications WHERE job_id = j.job_id) as applicant_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM applications WHERE job_id = j.job_id AND status = 'accepted') as accepted_count FROM jobs j ORDER BY j.created_at DESC

queries.hover: This query was called more than once.

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT j.job_id as id, j.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM applications WHERE job_id = j.job_id) as applicant_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM applications WHERE job_id = j.job_id AND status = 'accepted') as accepted_count FROM jobs j ORDER BY j.created_at DESC
